variants.title: HiFi Filter SACR 01005 Latch
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SACR 01005 Latch. Easy to install and replace, the SACR 01005 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: LATCH, Dimension 1 (D1): 57.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 26.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 24.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 20.0 mm
